response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems beyond a brief role at National Instruments over a decade ago; modern C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, and industrial protocols are not evidenced in recent work, which is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web and GIS contexts.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and DevOps tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community projects
concerns: No recent C++ development in relevant domains (industrial automation, embedded, or high-performance systems)
Absence of demonstrated experience with message brokers, MQTT, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, with minimal alignment to core C++ requirements
